#ad Exciting news! This Christmas, I’ve partnered with @coteuk for the launch of their Côte at Home Festive Collection – luxury dining delivered to your door. In the Nights Before Christmas box, you can find my exclusive guide to wrapping tricky gifts and adding the perfect festive finishing touches - alongside a delicious three-course menu. Enjoy steak truffes and potato gratin, a dreamy dark chocolate mousse and a gift of luxurious crepe paper to give your presents a traditionally French feel. This year spend less time in the kitchen and more time with your loved ones getting Christmas-ready!

latestPosts.caption:
Over a year in the making and it’s finally here!!!! 
It would have been really easy for me to give you a book of folds but I already give you that on Social Media. Instead I’ve given you folds AND sooooo much more. 
My journey on social media, massive chats about after value, happiness and feeling good about your home. 
We talk about how to do a R.E.S.E.T so its meaningful and fits into yours and your households lifestyle not because you saw it on Instagram! 

I want you to be happy in your homes and organise with meaning and respect for yourself and others…if you do it for any other reasons it’s will last 2mins! 

Folding Fam this book is for you guys and I cannot wait for you to get your copies!!!! 

3 weeks to go!!

#foldingclothes #home #springcleaning #organization #organised #organização

Told this story on my stories today and it made everyone cry so I’m putting it out to the world. Well done Tom Holland aka Spider-Man. 

**note I knew who Tom Holland was but I haven’t watched the Spider-Man films so I wasn’t in the know about that.

This is my 4th Amazon Summit and there’s only been 4 so a full house! It’s amazing to see how it’s grown, now with a venue full of all the top Amazon Influencers from across Europe. A room full of the hardest working people on social media and the nicest! Both facts!
